methods.name: updateApplication

methods.desc: Initialize the contract (cover MBR increases, opt into asset(s) etc)

methods.name: updateConfig

args.name: minStakeTime
args.desc: new min stake value, can be 0 to disable

methods.desc: Update the app config (only callable by the manager)

args.name: axfer
args.desc: - The asset transfer transaction containing the amount to stake

returns.desc: The total amount of tokens staked by the user after staking

methods.name: unstake

args.name: amount
args.desc: - The amount of tokens to unstake

returns.desc: The amount of tokens remaining in the user stake after unstaking

methods.name: deleteUserState
methods.desc: Delete a users state and refund them mbr box costs

methods.name: getPendingRewards

args.name: account
args.desc: account to view pending rewards for

returns.desc: the amount of pending rewards (consider rounding down issues)

methods.desc: View/get pending rewards for an account

methods.name: getMbrCost
methods.desc:
Convenience function to work out how much the mbr will increase by
This might become dynamic in the future, so just keeping it implemented like this

methods.name: updateManager
methods.desc: Update the manager of this contract

methods.name: deleteManager
methods.desc: Delete the manager of this contract

methods.name: manager

returns.desc: The current manager of this contract

methods.desc: Convenience function to get the current manager of this contract

stakingAsset.desc: The asset ID of the token to be staked

rewardsAsset.desc: The asset ID of the token to be used as rewards

totalStaked.desc: The total amount of stakingToken staked in the contract

totalRewards.desc: The total amount of rewardsToken remaining in the app

minStakeTime.desc: Minimum staking period (to claim rewards, not possible if user tries to claim before this

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Index access is out of bounds
can only call when not creating
cannot claim rewards before minimum stake time has passed
cannot unstake more than is staked
manager cannot be the zero address
only the manager can call this method
only the user or manager can call this
should not yet be opted in to the assets
user must claim all rewards before deleting state
user must unstake all tokens before deleting state
